hero.label: Made for Shaped
hero.headline: I want to build Shaped's sales engine from the ground up.
hero.subheadline: Shaped is solving a real problem: e-commerce discovery is broken, and AI can fix it. After closing 15-20 paying clients at Copygen and running digital campaigns at NextAfter, I'm ready to own pipeline generation for a Series A company with serious backing (Madrona, YC) and a founder who's building something people actually need.

whyCompany.title: E-commerce search and recommendations are a massive TAM
whyCompany.body: Every marketplace struggles with discovery. Shaped's AI-powered solution directly increases conversion and revenue, which every e-commerce operator cares about. This isn't a nice-to-have, it's core to their business model. That's what makes prospecting easier: you're selling to real pain.

whyCompany.title: Series A inflection point with strong investor backing
whyCompany.body: Shaped just closed Series A led by Madrona with participation from YC and executives from Okta, Docusign, and StitchFix. This is the exact moment when SDRs build the sales motion that scales the company. You're not joining a pre-product startup, you're joining a company proving product-market fit.

whyCompany.title: Ignacio's BDR foundation transfers directly to this role
whyCompany.body: I closed 15-20 paying clients at Copygen using cold outreach, HubSpot, and LinkedIn sequences. I know how to prospect, qualify, and set up demos. At NextAfter, I learned B2B buying cycles and how to structure campaigns. I'm not starting from zero on prospecting fundamentals.

quote: I've seen what happens when you combine real product value with consistent outreach. Shaped has the product. I want to own the outreach.
